steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$1.8x + 3.4y = 6$$ and $$5.4x + 10.2y = 18$$. This gives $\frac{5.4}{1.8}=\frac{10.2}{3.4}=\frac{18}{6}=3$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: All three ratios are equal, so the equations are equivalent — infinitely many solutions. That matches Choice C — Infinitely many.
